settings.title: Settings

profile.name: Name
profile.teachingStyleDescription: Choose how you want professors to talk to you and correct you
profile.adaptiveDifficultyDescription: Professors adapt difficulty and explanations based on signals like questions, response times, and need for repetitions.
profile.introductionDescription: Review the introduction to MirrorBuddy and discover all available features.

teachingStyles.superEncouragingDesc: Always positive, celebrates every small progress
teachingStyles.superEncouragingFeedback: Fantastic! You're doing great! Every mistake is a step towards success!
teachingStyles.encouragingDesc: Supportive and patient, focus on the positive
teachingStyles.encouragingFeedback: Great work! You're almost right, try to think for a moment...
teachingStyles.balancedDesc: Balanced mix of praise and constructive corrections
teachingStyles.balancedFeedback: Good attempt. There's an error here - review the concept and try again.
teachingStyles.strictFeedback: Wrong. You skipped a fundamental step. Go back and redo it.
teachingStyles.brutalFeedback: No. Completely wrong. You need to study more, this isn't working.

adaptiveModes.manualDesc: Only suggestions, professor asks for confirmation
adaptiveModes.balancedDesc: Adapts pace and difficulty while maintaining stability

profile.feedbackBalanced: Balanced: a mix of praise and corrections
profile.feedbackStrict: Strict: high standards and precise corrections
profile.feedbackSuperEncouraging: Super encouraging: positivity and constant support
